title: A minimal rrvix paper
abstract:
This paper exists as a parser conformance fixture. It contains one claim,
one piece of evidence, one citation, and one open question. Its only
purpose is to round-trip through rrvix-python's parser into a
valid Canonical Intermediate Representation (CIR).

claims.statement:
A minimal rrvix paper, when compiled by rrvix.cls v0.1, emits a
sidecar *.rrvix.aux file from which the rrvix parser can produce
a CIR object that validates against cir.schema.json v0.1.0.
